# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: Complete Application Stack using VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, and Load Balancer
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Complete Application Stack VPC
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    DependsOn: Vpc
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Complete Application Stack Internet Gateway
  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      Routes:
        - CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
          GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Complete Application Stack Route Table
  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Complete Application Stack Subnet 1
  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Complete Application Stack Subnet 2
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Complete Application Stack Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Complete Application Stack Security Group
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-1234567890abcdef0
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: my-key-pair
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeviceIndex: 0
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref SecurityGroup
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: Complete Application Stack EC2 Instance
  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: 5
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: my-rds-user
      MasterUserPassword: my-strong-password
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Complete Application Stack RDS Instance
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: complete-application-stack-bucket
      AccessControl: Private
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Complete Application Stack S3 Bucket
  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Complete Application Stack Load Balancer
Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: The ID of the VPC created by this stack
    Value: !Ref Vpc
  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: The ID of the Internet Gateway created by this stack
    Value: !GetAtt InternetGateway.InternetGatewayId
  RouteTableId:
    Description: The ID of the Route Table created by this stack
    Value: !Ref RouteTable
  Subnet1Id:
    Description: The ID of the first subnet created by this stack
    Value: !Ref Subnet1
  Subnet2Id:
    Description: The ID of the second subnet created by this stack
    Value: !Ref Subnet2
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: The ID of the security group created by this stack
    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: The ID of the EC2 instance created by this stack
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.InstanceId
  RDSInstanceId:
    Description: The ID of the RDS instance created by this stack
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.DBInstanceIdentifier
  S3BucketName:
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket created by this stack
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  LoadBalancerArn:
    Description: The ARN of the load balancer created by this stack
    Value: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.LoadBalancerArn
